scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "bun run --filter=@openpanel/web dev" "bun run --filter=@openpanel/server dev"
scripts.build: bun run --filter=@openpanel/server build && bun run --filter=@openpanel/web build
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "bun run --filter=@openpanel/web start" "bun run --filter=@openpanel/server start"
scripts.test: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun test
